April Art Dump

Ok actual REAL first blog post…..

It was my mom’s birthday recently and I had this horribly brilliant idea to make a little plush of our dog who died last year as a gift. I have never sewn anything more than a loose button so I was kind of losing my mind trying to figure out how to stitch everything together. I think I eventually got the hang of it though! It only took like..3 attempts, but I was pretty proud of myself. I think she ended up liking it too! When she got it though she told me she reconsidered getting a new dog which was not my intention, but I guess that also means it kind of resembled her so yay! but also omfg I did nawt mean to elicit such a reaction FAWWKK

My first attempt. I fucked up the stitching so she looks pretty rough...but kinda charming in a way?

Final! I think the snout could've been longer but it was like 4am and I wanted to sleep lol

Gouache Practice

I haven’t painted in like a year(?) so I was kind of afraid to touch gouache again because what if I lost all my super epic incredible painting skillz………honestly I kind of did LOL but that is the reality of not practicing for a year. I’ll just have to paint a million more so here’s to hoping I stay somewhat consistent.

MS Paint Doodles

Drawing of me :-) I tend to draw myself when I warmup

Project Hail Mary doodles...........I need everyone to get on that space alien yaoi right NEOWWWWW

Figures! I love figure drawing I wish I could just draw the human body for the rest of my life.

Tomodachi Life LTD

I haven’t really done a lot of personal art recently because all of that time is going into Tomodachi Life lmao….here’s all my foolish miis so far.

My island is lowkey turning into anime girlboy island now that I'm looking at them all together #hmmm

Getting my ass clocked ough..

Well that is all I got for now! Artfight is coming up...I should probably setup an account.
